title: THE $1 CODER: This CODER COSTS $1 AND GIVES YOU $50 WORTH USAGE!
summary: CommandCode is a coding agent harness optimized for open-source models including DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, Qwen, and MiniMax. It improves agent performance through routing, caching, context handling, and tool-call repair. The platform includes features like plan mode, headless mode, MCP support, and PR review at low cost (from $1/month).
writeup: The video covers CommandCode, a coding agent harness tuned for open-source models including DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, Qwen, and MiniMax. It explains how the harness improves output through model routing, caching, context handling, and tool-call repair. The platform claims DeepSeek V4 Pro beat Opus 4.7 on six of ten hard evaluation slices, with pricing starting at one dollar per month.
